message:
chore: link articles to jeffreyemanuel.com, remove all collapsibles

Article-type projects (Grassmann, CMA-ES, Hoeffding's D, Bakery
Algorithm, Temporal Logic, Lighthill Debate, LLM Introspective
Compression, LLM Tournament) now link to jeffreyemanuel.com articles.
All <details> sections expanded into regular headings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+## Background - Spent a decade as a long/short equity analyst at hedge funds in New York - Building with deep learning since 2010, multi-agent systems since 2023 - Consult to PE firms and hedge funds on AI automation strategy - The Flywheel ecosystem started in October 2025 and each tool accelerates the creation of the next - -
